top_signals.title: China rides AI wave as exports surge past forecast
top_signals.summary: A surge in global AI investment has helped the world's top manufacturer offset the export hit many had expected from the Middle East turmoil.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Award winning Medtech firm excels again
top_signals.summary: Founded in 2014, MV.Health is a trusted global leader in clinical-grade medical devices transforming urological and gynaecological health. Their doctor-designed products adapt to the user’s anatomy and address various sexual dysfunctions. Historically, the stigma and fear of invasive clinical procedures have deterred men from seeking proactive prostate care. MV.Health’s breakthrough Molto device won this year’s [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CISA gives feds 3 days to patch Check Point VPN bug exploited as zero-day
top_signals.summary: CISA has ordered U.S. government agencies to secure their Check Point Remote Access VPN and Mobile Access deployments against a critical vulnerability exploited in zero-day attacks by Qilin ransomware affiliates. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Giant Oil Supertanker Orders Eclipse Record Set in 2008
top_signals.summary: The world’s shipowners have placed orders for a record number of new oil supertankers, surpassing a boom back in 2008 that ultimately led to a glut and a collapse in rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Basque Region Raising €500 Million Bond for Industrial Strategy
top_signals.summary: The Basque government is raising €500 million ($577 million) from bonds to support the Spanish region’s industrial investment strategy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
